heading: Waiver of rights
label: 1856 Waiver of rights
text: Agreements by employees purporting to waive or to modify their rights under this chapter shall be void as contrary to public policy, except that a waiver or modification of rights in favor of the Secretary shall be valid for purposes of enforcement of this chapter.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 90 days from , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 14, 1983section 524 of Pub. L. 97–470section 1801 of this title
